About the Firm

In the heart of a dynamic legal environment—where rapid developments, converging influences, and accelerating transformations require swift yet well-considered responses—Hamza & Partners Law Firm For Legal Consultation, and Practice was founded to be more than just a traditional law firm. Rather, it is a fully integrated legal entity, dedicated to redefining the concept of legal service itself.

Rooted in a legacy of specialized legal practice spanning decades, the firm brings together deep legal expertise and a strong understanding of economic and commercial frameworks.

We do not merely practice law; we act as strategic trustworthy partners to our clients, helping them achieve their objectives through a seamless blend of legal insight and business acumen. With a team of highly skilled and perceptive professionals—comprising experienced lawyers and specialized consultants—we deliver tailor-made legal solutions designed to simplify complexity and empower our clients with clarity and control.

,,

we achieve our objective of excellent client service

“

We reflect the model of a professional law firm that combines disciplined professional interaction with clients and a commitment to providing highly efficient legal services, within a framework of professionalism and compliance with international standards. This is supported by an extensive network of professional relations and digital systems designed to facilitate interaction and ensure smooth service delivery. Our services extend from corporate legal advisory that takes into account both international and local regulatory frameworks—drawing on experience derived from the application of diverse international legislative and regulatory systems—through alternative dispute resolution mechanisms, and up to judicial representation in complex disputes before all levels of litigation.

Our values

TIME

We recognize that time is not merely a resource to be managed, but may in fact hold a value that surpasses the service itself, particularly when outcomes are tied to precise timing. We appreciate those critical moments in which timely performance becomes a decisive responsibility, and we devote our full capacity to meeting that responsibility. For us, time is not only an organizational obligation, but a strategic value that translates into collective discipline, precise prioritization, and delivery that aligns with the sensitivity of the moment.

Innovation

At Hamza & Partners, we redefine legal assumptions and break away from conventional patterns to deliver solutions distinguished by innovation and effectiveness, grounded in thorough analysis and a legal vision that departs from the traditional approach. We practice law in a language that is accessible to all, without compromising technical depth or professional craftsmanship.

Opportunities

We do not stop at the limits of challenges; rather, we believe that every legal situation as an opportunity to create a competitive advantage for the client. We believe that the law is not merely an instrument of protection, but a comprehensive regulatory framework that requires interconnected analyses to secure a solid present and to bring forth defined opportunities for a promising future.

Learning

We measure progress by our ability to learn from the past, document experiences, and transform them into working tools, so that the firm becomes a living entity that remembers, learns, and reinvents.

Integration

Every legal challenge we face is approached within a participatory framework, where expertise converges, and solutions are formed. We do not think as individuals, but as a single system living in a constant state of collaboration.

Our Mission

Achieving results and reaching objectives lies at the core of our mission; for we believe that the effectiveness of the legal role is manifested through three interrelated pillars: the drafting of detailed and professional agreements that lay the foundation for secure future outcomes; mediation and dispute settlement that yield immediate results supporting present stability; and litigation strategies and rights recovery that reshape the roadmap and rectify what may have passed. Through this integrated vision, which balances anticipation with redress, we outline the contours of a sustainable legal impact that reflects the firm’s philosophy of building solutions that not only withstand the passage of time but are continuously shaped in alignment with the client’s best interests.

We believe that the true mission of the legal profession goes beyond providing support in times of crisis; it extends to a constant presence in every decision and every step. Our mission is to empower our clients to steer their businesses with confidence, through advisory services grounded in comprehensive and precise understanding—integrating law with economics, and bridging text with reality—so that both are applied within a practical framework that contributes to shaping actionable decisions with tangible impact.

Through what we term ‘Comprehensive Legal Insurance,’ your perception of legal protection against any potential liability is reshaped, safeguarding your rights, investments, and business as a whole. By providing a proactive legal umbrella that accounts for all aspects of legal risk, we fortify your commercial and contractual pathways. We offer a holistic legal approach that does not stop at remedy, but is founded upon protection and advance planning, in order to enhance confidence and instill assurance within a rapidly changing business environment.

Our vision

We aspire to build the law firm of the future, where barriers between law and technology disappear, and legal expertise becomes seamlessly accessible in an interactive manner. Our vision is grounded in reimagining the concept of access to justice—not solely through the courts, but also through the design of legal tools that enhance the empowerment of individuals and organizations.

We believe that the contemporary law firm should serve as a fully integrated, dynamic legal factory that generates intelligent legal products. From this perspective, Hamza & Partners embodies the model of a forward-thinking, innovative institution—one that does not merely keep pace with change, but actively seeks to shape it, from its position at the forefront of international and regional legal innovation.

Our vision is anchored in building a preventive legal framework that enables our clients to strengthen their long-term legal stability. We do not wait for challenges to arise; rather, we anticipate them by providing precise advice that serves as the first line of defense in protecting our clients’ interests, and by drafting well-structured agreements that close off all avenues of ambiguity or dispute. We direct investments toward the most suitable legal pathways to secure a sustainable and safe business environment.

Our culture

The culture of Hamza & Partners is a fabric woven from ambition, discipline, and a spirit of challenge. We believe that success is never a matter of chance, but the outcome of written plans, genuine collaboration, and an environment that unleashes potential, encourages open dialogue, and promotes logical thinking.

We carefully select our team members not only on the basis of competence, but also on passion and belief in the firm’s mission. Each individual is a project we nurture and support, driving them to become the best version of themselves.

We cultivate a culture that integrates personal and professional growth, where workshops, development programs, and discussion circles are not supplementary activities, but part of the daily fabric. We eliminate sources of tension and build a supportive environment that values time, rewards initiative, and listens attentively to the pulse of the team.

Our Policy

Leadership and Excellence

We recognize that achieving legal distinction is only complete when services exceed the client’s expectations in terms of quality and accuracy. Accordingly, we are committed to continuously restructuring our practice to ensure alignment with the client’s evolving needs and aspirations. We believe that every interaction, every service, and every procedure constitutes an opportunity to enhance the legal experience—through specialized legal teams and well-considered processes—that contributes to building a professional relationship which goes beyond expected performance toward delivering results that inspire.

Professional Confidentiality

At Hamza & Partners, confidentiality is not reduced to written policies, but is practiced as a daily commitment and a fundamental professional principle. We manage the flow of information within the firm through strict controls on access, review, and sharing, ensuring that no information is disclosed except within the limits of legal necessity and in accordance with the client’s interests. Our meetings are conducted in secure environments, and we exercise strict oversight over the circulation of documents and files. Here, privacy is not a matter of choice, but a cornerstone of our professional relationship with the client, governed by legal obligation.

Continuous Development

We are committed to a methodology of continuous development, where review and evaluation are not limited to legal procedures alone, but extend to team members as well, through regular professional assessments and daily interaction that contribute to the advancement of both individual and collective performance. All legal and technical processes are subjected to periodic review to ensure the efficiency of outcomes and the accuracy of execution, while observations and experiences are transformed into practical tools through real-world application. This approach strengthens our ability to provide innovative legal solutions that remain responsive to change.

Our culture

Legal Clarity

We reformulate complex legal concepts into practical and actionable procedures without compromising professionalism or accuracy. We deliver exceptional legal solutions based on thorough analysis and a professional structure that takes into account the client’s practical needs, achieving effective results without burdening them with confusing or unnecessary details.

Strict Compliance

We adhere to the highest levels of accuracy and organizational discipline, subjecting all relationships and transactions to thorough and comprehensive review processes that ensure full compliance with the legal and regulatory framework, while minimizing any potential legal or contractual risks to our clients.

Practice Areas

Drafting of Agreements in Light of Investment Flows and Their Administration

Mediation, Arbitration, and Dispute Resolution

Litigation

Corporate and Project Services

Restructuring and Insolvency

Corporate Governance and Mergers & Acquisitions

Tax Transactions

Banking and Finance

Practice Areas

Capital Markets

Financial and Corporate Crimes

Real Estate Sector

Intellectual Property (IP)

Healthcare Sector

Cybercrimes

Hospitality and Tourism

Biography

Ahmad Hamza is the Managing Partner at Hamza & Partners Law Firm. Hamza specialises in corporate structuring, dispute resolution and criminal corporate. He represents clients in legal critical situations. Mr. Hamza does not simply give legal opinions but rather a strategy for legal claims. 

Recent experience

Mr. Hamza has most notable experience lies in corporate structuring, corporate services, drafting agreements, criminal pleadings, drawing all legal aspects of investment flow in relation with real estate transactions.

Representing foreign individuals and multinational entities such as ExxonMobil, Siemens Egypt, Lafarge, Novartis Egypt, Amlak Egypt, MUCIA project in Egypt (one of USAID projects), and one of governmental entities at Switzerland 

lead commercial transactions and controls every corporate service and played as a key role in major corporate initiatives while providing special legal support in negotiations, bilateral agreements, and regulatory compliance, as well as being one of the resources for legal consultations, and advices in the complex legal topics, and ranked as a notable practitioner criminal corporate pleading shining star.

Being a member of the team that lead the incorporation of VFS Tasheel, and Vasco World Wide projects in Egypt, also representing them before all governmental authorities to get all of licenses and permits.

Representing one of the top companies in real estate sector in Egypt, and personally handling all lawsuits related to its properties in Egypt. 

Education

2004 – LL.B Ain Shams University

2014 – LL.M., Arab Academy for Science and Technology, International Legal, Commercial transactions, and logistics

Languages

Arabic.   English.

Admission

2015 – Licensed Patents Agent 

2005 – Egyptian Bar Association

2020 - International Arbitration Center (Licensed Arbitrator)
